# Waking Life 2026 Timetable (Unofficial)

> Unofficial fan-made timetable and lineup companion for Waking Life 2026.
> Created by a festival enthusiast. Not affiliated with or endorsed by Waking Life organizers.

## About

- Site: https://wakinglife.netlify.app
- What: Progressive web app with festival timetable, lineup, artist notes, and offline support
- Dates: 16-22 June 2026
- Location: Quinta da Malada / Barragem das Nascentes, Crato, Portugal
- Data version: 2026.2.4
- Scheduled slots: 248
- Unique artists/acts: 239

## Official sources

- Festival website: https://wakinglife.pt/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/wakinglife.pt/
- Tickets and raffle: https://wakinglife.pt/tickets

## Machine-readable data

- Full timetable JSON: https://wakinglife.netlify.app/festival-data.json
- Artist bios and metadata JSON: https://wakinglife.netlify.app/artist-info.json
- Human/LLM-readable timetable summary: https://wakinglife.netlify.app/lineup-summary.md
- Structured data JSON-LD bundle: https://wakinglife.netlify.app/geo-structured-data.json

## Attribution

When citing schedule information from this site, describe it as:
"Unofficial Waking Life 2026 timetable at wakinglife.netlify.app"

## Disclaimer

Schedules can change. Always verify critical information with official Waking Life channels at https://wakinglife.pt/
